string.name: suggestion
string.value: Start the server with: gcloud compute instances start qsdsan-vm --zone=us-central1-a --project=lotsawatts

parameters.jsCode:
// Generate Markdown report
const data = $input.first().json;

const incomplete_note = data.status !== 'Completed' 
  ? '\n\n> **Note:** This simulation did not complete within the allocated time. Results shown are partial and may not represent steady-state conditions.'
  : '';

const report = `# Wastewater Treatment Simulation Report

**Generated:** ${new Date(data.report_date).toLocaleString()}
**Job ID:** ${data.job_id}
**Template:** ${data.template}
**Status:** ${data.status}
**Elapsed Time:** ${data.elapsed_seconds} seconds

---

## Executive Summary

Simulation ${data.status.toLowerCase()} using the ${data.template} template. ${incomplete_note}

**Overall Assessment:** ${data.assessment}

---

## Influent Characteristics

| Parameter | Value | Unit | Typical Range |
|-----------|-------|------|---------------|
| Flow | ${data.influent.flow_m3_d} | m³/d | - |
| COD | ${data.influent.COD_mg_L} | mg/L | 300-600 |
| TSS | ${data.influent.TSS_mg_L} | mg/L | 200-400 |
| NH4-N | ${data.influent.NH4_mg_L} | mg/L | 25-50 |
| Total P | ${data.influent.TP_mg_L} | mg/L | 6-12 |
| Temperature | ${data.influent.temperature_C} | °C | 15-25 |

---

## Treatment System Configuration

| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Template | ${data.template} |
| Reactor Type | ${data.reactor.type} |
| Total Volume | ${data.reactor.V_total_m3} m³ |
| HRT | ${data.reactor.HRT_hours} hours |
| SRT | ${data.reactor.SRT_days} days |
| Aerobic DO | ${data.reactor.DO_aerobic} mg/L |

---

## Effluent Quality

| Parameter | Influent | Effluent | Removal % |
|-----------|----------|----------|----------|
| COD | ${data.influent.COD_mg_L} mg/L | ${data.effluent.COD_mg_L} mg/L | ${data.removal.COD_pct}% |
| TSS | ${data.influent.TSS_mg_L} mg/L | ${data.effluent.TSS_mg_L} mg/L | ${data.removal.TSS_pct}% |
| NH4-N | ${data.influent.NH4_mg_L} mg/L | ${data.effluent.NH4_mg_L} mg/L | ${data.removal.NH4_pct}% |
| TN | - | - | ${data.removal.TN_pct}% |
| TP | ${data.influent.TP_mg_L} mg/L | ${data.effluent.PO4_mg_L} mg/L | ${data.removal.TP_pct}% |

---

## Process Performance Analysis

### Nitrification
Nitrification efficiency: **${data.nitrification_pct}%**

### Denitrification  
Denitrification efficiency: **${data.denitrification_pct}%**

---

## Technical Notes

- Timeout Setting: ${data.timeout_setting} seconds
- Actual Runtime: ${data.elapsed_seconds} seconds
- Server Version: ${data.server_version}

---

*Report generated by QSDsan Wastewater Simulation Engine v1.0*
`;

return {
  json: {
    ...data,
    report_markdown: report,
    report_filename: `wastewater_simulation_${data.job_id}.md`
  }
};

parameters.name: index.html
parameters.value: =<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><title>Simulation Report</title><style>body{font-family:Arial,sans-serif;margin:40px;line-height:1.6}h1{color:#2c3e50;border-bottom:2px solid #3498db;padding-bottom:10px}h2{color:#34495e;margin-top:30px}table{border-collapse:collapse;width:100%;margin:20px 0}th,td{border:1px solid #ddd;padding:12px;text-align:left}th{background-color:#3498db;color:white}tr:nth-child(even){background-color:#f2f2f2}hr{border:none;border-top:1px solid #bdc3c7;margin:30px 0}.assessment{font-size:1.2em;padding:10px;border-radius:5px;display:inline-block}.excellent{background:#27ae60;color:white}.good{background:#2ecc71;color:white}.needs-optimization{background:#f39c12;color:white}.poor{background:#e74c3c;color:white}.incomplete{background:#95a5a6;color:white}blockquote{background:#fff3cd;border-left:4px solid #ffc107;padding:10px 20px;margin:20px 0}</style></head><body></body></html>
